PreToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.env'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit .env files — these contain API keys' >&2; exit 2; fi

PostToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then npx eslint --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
